faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in East New York?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in East New York typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on nest size, location, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout East New York and surrounding Brooklyn neighborhoods. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we're available for emergency situations when immediate threats exist.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and professional techniques that effectively eliminate wasps while minimizing risk to children, pets, and the environment. Our technicians are fully trained in safe application methods and take all necessary precautions during removal.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your wasp removal services?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our wasp removal services in East New York come with a satisfaction guarantee. If wasps return to the treated area within our warranty period, we'll return at no additional charge to re-treat the problem.
